description: Standalone CLI for Dreo smart-home devices — bulk control, live sensor streams, and local history every other Dreo tool throws away.

tools.name: devices_list
tools.description: List every Dreo device on your account. Returns array of Device.

tools.name: devices_state
tools.description: Read the current state snapshot for one device. Required: deviceSn. Returns the DeviceState.

tools.name: firmware_check
tools.description: Check whether a firmware update is available for a device. Required: deviceSn. Returns the new FirmwareCheckResult.

tools.name: settings_get
tools.description: Get persistent settings for a device. Required: deviceSn. Returns the DeviceSettings.

tools.name: settings_update
tools.description: Update persistent settings for a device. Required: deviceSn. Optional: settings. Returns the updated DeviceSettings.

params.name: settings
params.description: Settings JSON blob to update (model-specific shape)
